creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladyslav V. Prodan from comment #5)

Thanks for the details, but I'm afraid that I'm still not sure how to recreate this problem. Do you have a step by step of what you are doing, and what's then failing? I have only a vague idea, and vague notion doesn't match my experience of doing what I think you are doing all the time...  so having the exact details will help me track down what's going wrong for you...
